SELECT DISTINCT ?group ?groupName WHERE {
  ?ceremony wdt:P179 wd:Q41254 ; wdt:P585 ?date ; wdt:P175 ?group .
  FILTER(?date >= "2000-01-01T00:00:00Z" ^^ xsd:dateTime && ?date <= "2009-12-31T23:59:59Z" ^^ xsd:dateTime)

    ?group wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q201298 .

  FILTER(LANG(?groupName) = "en")
}
LIMIT 100
